text.title: Rate-Raise Conversation Script Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Rate-Raise Conversation Script output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

required.field: verbatim conversation script with anchor + transition

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: client_id populated with a typed value
current_rate populated with a typed value
market_rate_evidence populated with a typed value
new_rate populated with a typed value
script populated with a typed value
counter_responses populated with a typed value
walk_away_threshold populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
